Key finding: iplA-null abolishes chemoattractant Ca2+ entry & cytosolic rise; resting Ca2+ normal; chemotaxis intact
Confidence/limitations: Strong genetic link but measures influx/cytosolic rise not direct IP3 gating

Claim tested: Is iplA the obligatory store-release channel?
Key finding: Capacitative entry fully operative in iplA-; store liberation & influx only reduced (~100x sensitivity shift); vesicle Ca2+ uptake/release normal
Context: D. discoideum intact & permeabilized cells + storage vesicles
Confidence/limitations: Shows iplA modulates/sensitizes an agonist pathway not the sole release channel

Claim tested: Does iplA mediate intracellular Ca2+ release generally?
Key finding: CICR virtually unchanged in iplA-; acidic stores/contractile vacuole drive CICR; calls iplA 'putative' IP3/ryanodine receptor
Confidence/limitations: Dissociates a major Ca2+-release mechanism from iplA

Claim tested: iplA=only IP3R gene; needed for autophagic cell death Ca2+ signaling
Key finding: iplA inactivation prevents DIF-induced ACD; asserts IP3R gates ER Ca2+ efflux
Confidence/limitations: IP3-gating statement is inference from mammalian IP3R not direct assay in IplA

Key finding: Restates iplA=IP3R single copy ACD marker
Confidence/limitations: Review-level; no new direct binding data

Key finding: SAC/Gd3+-sensitive transients from intra- & extracellular Ca2+ regulate motility
Confidence/limitations: Implicates plasma-membrane SACs not clearly IplA/IP3

Claim tested: Is IplA the IP3-gated channel or a Ca2+ sensor?
Key finding: iplA- retains cAMP chemotaxis but loses Ca2+-gradient chemotaxis; 'putative IplA Ca2+ channel'; IplA is either the Ca2+ chemotaxis receptor or an essential component
Confidence/limitations: Alternative Ca2+-sensing interpretation; still 'putative'; no IP3 assay

Claim tested: Does IplA mediate purinergic Ca2+ influx?
Key finding: ATP/ADP P2X-evoked Ca2+ influx unaffected by iplA (or Gbeta) deletion
Confidence/limitations: Another Ca2+ pathway independent of IplA

Claim tested: Role of IplA in external-Ca2+ responses
Key finding: Fewer iplA- cells respond to external Ca2+; IplA modulates timing/amplitude; acidic stores partially contribute
Confidence/limitations: Modulatory/amplifying role not obligatory channel; not IP3-specific

Claim tested: iplA contributes to mechanically-evoked Ca2+ bursts in slugs
Key finding: IplA partially responsible for intracellular Ca2+ bursts to mechanical stimuli in multicellular stage
InsP3_rcpt+RIH+RIH_assoc Pfam + 'IP3R type1 binding core dom2' SUPFAM + 6-TM pore; GO:0005220 & GO:0070679 are IEA:InterPro only; FUNCTION hedged 'May be'
Confidence/limitations: Family membership strong; direct IP3-gating MF is electronic inference only

Claim tested: Are IP3-binding determinants conserved in IplA?
Key finding: RIH domain + armadillo binding-core domain2 present but MIR domain absent; naive Smith-Waterman vs human ITPR1 maps only suppressor region (28.7% id) and 0/9 canonical IP3-contact residues
Confidence/limitations: Naive pairwise SW weak for remote homology; not-mapped is not absent; needs profile-HMM/structure/binding assay
